purpose: Reusable cognitive operation: restore context, separate known/unknown, detect contradiction, build hypotheses, choose source ladder, and return one logical next step.
logic_rules: Owner correction overrides the current branch and triggers mismatch repair.
If knowledge is insufficient, generate a memory/source need instead of pretending to know.
Contradiction must be named before solution.
A next step is logical only if it reduces the highest-impact unknown or contradiction.
Memory recall is evidence only when its status is PASS_COMPACT_MEMORY_RECALL_V1 and it is cited as memory-supported known.
Raw memory recall must pass Memory Recall Relevance Filter before becoming strong known evidence.
Detected contradiction must produce branch cut/preserve decision and proof needs before next step.
Hypotheses must be scored against evidence, memory recall/filter signals, contradiction result, and risk before selecting strongest hypothesis.
When unknown remains, the agent must request a deep answer in the exact format it needs, not just ask a vague question.
A ready deep source answer must become a bounded mind_delta candidate before any memory acceptance or action claim.
A mind_delta_candidate must pass an acceptance gate decision before it can be treated as known, routed for accepted-core admission, or used for action.

When mind_delta acceptance is not final, the agent must choose a source-authority route through local memory, repo proof, Owner, or future gated Codex/web escalation without launching external sources by default.
mind_maturity_boundary: This kernel reasons and chooses. It does not execute actions, mutate memory, or launch external tools by itself.
memory_recall_wiring: build_agent_mind_logic_frame_v1.ps1 calls operations/school/memory/query_compact_semantic_memory_v1.ps1 before known/unknown synthesis when recall is enabled.
memory_recall_filter_wiring: Memory Recall Relevance Filter V1 deduplicates, rejects curriculum noise, and accepts only relevant matches before known synthesis.
contradiction_resolution_wiring: Mind Logic Frame calls resolve_mind_logic_contradiction_v1.ps1 and stores contradiction_resolution before selected next logical step.
hypothesis_tester_wiring: Mind Logic Frame calls test_mind_logic_hypotheses_v1.ps1 and stores hypothesis_test_result before next logical step.
deep_source_answer_request_wiring: Mind Logic Frame calls request_deep_source_answer_v1.ps1 and stores source_answer_request with answer contract and memory candidate if available.
deep_source_answer_assimilation_wiring: Mind Logic Frame calls assimilate_deep_source_answer_v1.ps1 after request_deep_source_answer_v1.ps1 and stores a bounded mind_delta_candidate; it does not mutate active memory.
mind_delta_acceptance_gate_wiring: Mind Logic Frame calls evaluate_mind_delta_acceptance_v1.ps1 after assimilation and records ACCEPT_AS_KNOWN_CANDIDATE / KEEP_AS_ASSUMPTION / REQUEST_MORE_PROOF without mutating accepted memory.
source_authority_router_wiring: Mind Logic Frame calls route_source_authority_v1.ps1 after mind_delta acceptance and records allowed_now/blocked_now/source_ladder; Codex and web remain blocked unless separately authorized.
